title: aconitum vulparia subsp. ranunculifolium
intro: Aconitum vulparia subsp. ranunculifolium, also known as wolf's bane, is a subspecies of the Aconitum vulparia plant, belonging to the Aconitum genus and the Ranunculaceae family of flowering plants. Traditionally, Aconitum vulparia subsp. ranunculifolium has been used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function, although its toxicity and potential side effects should be carefully considered. Herbal preparations of Aconitum vulparia subsp. ranunculifolium include tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, and should be made under the guidance of a qualified herbalist or healthcare professional.
